title: Vibe Coding Nights
description: Upcoming Vibe Coding Nights build nights at Frontier Tower, San Francisco.

items.title: VCN #41: Bare Metal
items.content_text: Run a coding agent against a local open-weights model. No API bill. Wed Jul 15, 7pm, Frontier Tower Floor 10.

items.title: VCN #42: The Sandbox
items.content_text: Give your agent a disposable code-exec sandbox. Sat Jul 18, 10am, Frontier Tower Floor 9.

items.title: VCN #43: Cattle, Not Pets
items.content_text: Spin your agent a throwaway micro VM. Wed Jul 22, 7pm, Frontier Tower Floor 10.

items.title: VCN #44: The Loop
items.content_text: Build the agent loop from scratch: plan, act, observe. Sat Jul 25, 10am, Frontier Tower Floor 9.

items.title: VCN #45: Bench
items.content_text: Write an eval for your coding agent. Your tasks, pass^k. Wed Jul 29, 7pm, Frontier Tower Floor 10.

items.title: VCN #46: Bake-Off
items.content_text: Coding agents head to head on your bench. Sat Aug 1, 10am, Frontier Tower Floor 9.

items.title: VCN #47: Fast Local
items.content_text: Quantize and serve local models fast. Wed Aug 5, 7pm, Frontier Tower Floor 10.

items.title: VCN #48: Total Recall
items.content_text: Repo memory and retrieval for the agent. Sat Aug 8, 10am, Frontier Tower Floor 9.

items.title: VCN #49: The Swarm
items.content_text: Parallel agents fanned out in git worktrees. Wed Aug 12, 7pm, Frontier Tower Floor 10.

items.title: VCN #50: Own the Stack
items.content_text: Capstone: self-host the full local rig, zero API bill. Sat Aug 15, 10am, Frontier Tower Floor 9.
